name: Steamed Shrimp with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the shells from the shrimp, leaving the tail sections on.
2. Butterfly each shrimp by slicing it down the back, not quite in half.
3. Rinse the shrimp well and remove the dark vein from each one.
4. Drain and pat the shrimp dry.
5. Place the shrimp on a platter in a single layer.
6. Heat the oil in a wok or skillet.
7. Add the minced garlic to the hot oil.
8. Lower the heat and cook the garlic for about 10 minutes, stirring constantly, until it turns brown.
9. Raise the heat and add the chopped scallions. Cook for 30 seconds.
10. Add the light soy sauce, rice wine, and sugar. Stir everything together for 30 seconds.
11. Place a dish with the shrimp into the steamer.
12. Cover each shrimp with a teaspoon of the garlic mixture.
13. Cover the steamer and steam the shrimp for 6 minutes.
14. Serve immediately.
